feedback.text: Hello, I would like to propose an expansion of the Digital Fairness Act to encompass video games. As the industry evolves, it is increasingly common for video games to depend on infrastructure owned by the game developers. When this infrastructure is removed or discontinued, consumers find themselves unable to access games they have purchased, effectively rendering them unplayable. The "Stop Killing Games" initiative addresses this issue in greater detail and highlights the need for consumer protection in this area.
